# Zanna Terminal Runtime Reference

[Back to the runtime reference index](README.md)

## Classes

<a id="zanna-terminal"></a>
### `Zanna.Terminal`

Provides terminal input, output, styling, and screen-control operations.

`Zanna.Terminal` exposes a registry-backed runtime surface without requiring callers to
construct the class directly. Its public surface exposes operations including `AskResult`,
`BeginBatch`, `Bell`, `Clear`.
